commands.repair_reason: A narrow automated repair can address the legacy-region safety bug and lazy-boundary issue on this PR without a product decision.; Needs attention: latest head uses guarded fetch and adds no dependencies, but missing metadata can send legacy CN refresh tokens to the Global MiniMax endpoint.; Review finding: [P2] Preserve the legacy MiniMax OAuth region — extensions/minimax/provider-registration.ts:289 - [P3] Keep th... commands.review_summary:
The PR branch adds a MiniMax Portal OAuth refresh-token grant, stores `resourceUrl` on new OAuth login credentials, exports the refresh helper, adds Global/CN refresh tests, and updates the changelog/raw-fetch allowlist offsets.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main has no `minimax-portal` `refreshOAuth` hook, and core refresh returns null when neither the plugin nor pi-ai can handle the provider. I did not run a live wait-for-expiry MiniMax flow.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can address the legacy-region safety bug and lazy-boundary issue on this PR without a product decision.

target.title: fix(providers/minimax): add refreshOAuth to minimax-portal so tokens auto-refresh
target.author: hclsys
